div1.entryFree: Mainly, forcibly, mightily: these four came all a-front and m. thrust at me, H4A II, 4, 222. I do not call your faith in question so m. as my merit, Troil. IV, 4, 87. by your safety, wisdom, all things else, you m. were stirred up, Hml. IV, 7, 9. I am m. ignorant what place this is, Lr. IV, 7, 65 (== perfectly).
